ops.title: Split auth_status keybag probe from screen-share netstat
ops.description: auth_status's locked-keybag detection only needs ioreg, but ProbeSession also runs netstat -anv -p tcp (screen-share detection, added 4cc74e8). The v0.10.3 fix bounds the whole probe at authStatusTimeout and reports keybag_locked on timeout — which can MASK a genuine degraded-cache FAIL (doctor renders OK-with-note "keybag locked" on an UNLOCKED host whose netstat is slow). First confirm which syscall is actually slow under screen share (ioreg vs netstat vs helper spawn) on a locked Mac (yasyf-home), then if netstat: give auth_status an ioreg-only probe.

ops.text: measured probe timings from a locked/screen-shared Mac recorded
auth_status keybag detection no longer times out due to netstat, or documented why whole-probe bound stays
